day1_lunch_start.name: 私
day1_lunch_start.text: *昼休み。腹減った。食堂がどこかもわからないし。*

day1_lunch_choice.name: 私
choices: セアが一緒に食べようって言ってたし教室に残る
静かな図書室に行ってみる
さっきから頭がちょっと痛い……保健室に行ってみようか

day1_lunch_sea_1.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_1.text: *I'm about to get up when Sea comes over.*

day1_lunch_sea_2.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_2.text: *セアがお弁当を広げる。量が多い。*

day1_lunch_sea_3.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_3.text: 「ちょっと多めに詰めてきちゃった、一緒に食べよ。口に合うといいんだけど。」

day1_lunch_sea_4.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_4.text: *サバの煮付けに卵焼きにほうれん草のナムル。家庭の味って感じで美味しい。*

day1_lunch_sea_6.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_6.text: 「これ本当に美味しい。自分で作ったの？」

day1_lunch_sea_7.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_7.text: 「...うん。朝早く起きて作ったの。」

day1_lunch_sea_8.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_8.text: *セアの耳たぶがほんのり赤くなった。褒められるのに弱いタイプなのか。*

day1_lunch_sea_9.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_9.text: 「ねえ、ここにご飯粒ついてるよ。」

day1_lunch_sea_11.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_11.text: *セアが慌てて頬をこする。委員長の体面はどこへやら、顔が真っ赤になった。*

day1_lunch_sea_12.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_12.text: 「...笑わないで。明日はもっと綺麗に食べるから。」

day1_lunch_sea_13.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_13.text: 「私、{name}のことは全部覚えてるよ。好きなおかずも、今日何時間目に居眠りしたかも。」

day1_lunch_sea_14.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_14.text: *そこまで見てくれるのは初めてで、少し照れくさい。ありがたい子だ。*

day1_lunch_sea_15.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_15.text: "Here, try the egg roll first. I made it on the sweet side."

day1_lunch_sea_16.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_16.text: *...Is she trying to feed me? No, she's just holding it out. Right.*

day1_lunch_sea_18.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_18.text: *I quickly take it and eat it. ...It's good. Actually good.*

day1_lunch_sea_22.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_22.text: *Sea's face lights up. She looks genuinely happy.*

day1_lunch_sea_23.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_23.text: "Great~ Then try the sausages too. I cut them into octopus shapes."

day1_lunch_sea_25.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_25.text: *The ends of the sausages are slit to fan out like little legs. She put thought into this.*

day1_lunch_sea_26.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_26.text: "I've been making them like this since I was little. Childish, right?"

day1_lunch_sea_29.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_29.text: *Sea's cheeks go faintly pink as she smiles.*

day1_lunch_sea_30.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_30.text: "Anyway, eat up. There are rice balls too."

day1_lunch_sea_31.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_31.text: *We chat about the food for a long time — one compliment after another.*

day1_lunch_sea_33.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_33.text: "Yep. The school lunch is fine, but homemade just tastes better."

day1_lunch_sea_34.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_34.text: "Seems like a lot for one person."

day1_lunch_sea_36.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_36.text: *Sea pauses for a moment, then smiles.*

day1_lunch_sea_37.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_37.text: "I just tend to make a lot. It's nice having someone who actually eats it all."

day1_lunch_sea_39.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_39.text: *Sea cleans up the empty lunchbox and asks casually:*

day1_lunch_sea_40.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_40.text: "...I'm really glad you enjoyed it. Should I bring one again tomorrow?"

day1_lunch_sea_41.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_41.text: "Every day? Isn't that too much trouble?"

day1_lunch_sea_42.name: ハン・セア
day1_lunch_sea_42.text: "Not at all. Making it is so much more rewarding when there's someone to eat it."

day1_lunch_sea_43.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_43.text: *Sea beams. A lunchbox on my very first day. She's definitely a good person.*

day1_lunch_sea_44.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_44.text: *...But everything in this box is exactly what I'd pick. Egg roll, sausages, rice balls. Just a coincidence?*

day1_lunch_sea_45.name: 私
day1_lunch_sea_45.text: *Well, they're all pretty common foods. Anyone would like these.*

day1_lunch_yuna_1.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_1.text: *本棚の間を歩いていると、奥の方から「カシャッ」と音がする。*

day1_lunch_yuna_3.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_3.text: *カメラを持った女子生徒が慌てた顔でこっちを見ている。*

day1_lunch_yuna_5.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_5.text: 「はい！図書室の風景撮ってたんですけど、急に現れたから……すみません！1年のチェ・ユナです。転校生の先輩ですよね？」

day1_lunch_yuna_6.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_6.text: *にこにこ笑ってる。かわいい後輩だ。*

day1_lunch_yuna_7.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_7.text: 「先輩、ちょっと待ってください。動かないでください。」

day1_lunch_yuna_8.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_8.text: *ユナが突然カメラを持ち上げて窓に向かってシャッターを切る。カシャッ。*

day1_lunch_yuna_9.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_9.text: 「見てください、先輩の後ろから光が差し込んでてすごく綺麗で...あ、先輩の顔は写ってないですよ！風景だけ！」

day1_lunch_yuna_10.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_10.text: *慌てて言い訳しているが、カメラの画面には私のシルエットがくっきり。...この後輩、意外と大胆だ。*

day1_lunch_yuna_11.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_11.text: "I'm so sorry. I'll delete it right away...!"

day1_lunch_yuna_12.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_12.text: "No, it's fine. I was just surprised. So you're in the photography club."

day1_lunch_yuna_13.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_13.text: "Yes...! I'm Choi Yuna, first year. You're the transfer student, right?"

day1_lunch_yuna_15.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_15.text: "Oh... yes. Nice to meet you, senpai."

day1_lunch_yuna_16.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_16.text: *Yuna hugs her camera to her chest and bows her head. Her face is red. Seems like a shy kid.*

day1_lunch_yuna_17.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_17.text: "Do you take a lot of pictures? Being in the photography club and all."

day1_lunch_yuna_18.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_18.text: "Yeah! All the time. School scenery, cats... oh, there's a cat in the school backyard."

day1_lunch_yuna_20.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_20.text: "Yeah... a stray that comes to the backyard. I call her Cheeze..."

day1_lunch_yuna_21.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_21.text: *Her eyes light up the moment she mentions the cat. Like the shy version of her I just met never existed.*

day1_lunch_yuna_22.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_22.text: "...Senpai. Do you come to the library often? I'm here every day."

day1_lunch_yuna_23.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_23.text: "Yeah, I like that it's quiet. Perfect place to relax during lunch."

day1_lunch_yuna_24.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_24.text: "Right?! This is the most peaceful spot in the whole school. Not many people come here either."

day1_lunch_yuna_25.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_25.text: *Yuna hugs her camera and smiles. Shy, but warm.*

day1_lunch_yuna_26.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_26.text: "If senpai comes here often... I won't feel so lonely."

day1_lunch_yuna_27.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_27.text: *She murmurs quietly. She seems like a sweet kid.*

day1_lunch_yuna_28.name: 私
day1_lunch_yuna_28.text: "Then show me those cat photos sometime."

day1_lunch_yuna_29.name: チェ・ユナ
day1_lunch_yuna_29.text: "Oh... really? Then... you'll come to the library again, right...?"

day1_lunch_riin_1.name: 保健教師
day1_lunch_riin_1.text: 「あら、初日から保健室？どこか具合悪い？」

day1_lunch_riin_2.name: 私
day1_lunch_riin_2.text: 「頭がちょっと痛くて。頭痛薬ありますか？」

day1_lunch_riin_3.name: 保健教師
day1_lunch_riin_3.text: 「ちょっと座って。基本的なチェックするね。……うん、健康だね。よかった。」

day1_lunch_riin_4.name: 私
day1_lunch_riin_4.text: *簡単に診てもらった。保健室は清潔で静かだ。*

day1_lunch_riin_5.name: 保健教師
day1_lunch_riin_5.text: 「薬ここにあるよ。疲れてたら少し休んでいっていいからね。」

day1_lunch_riin_6.name: 保健教師
day1_lunch_riin_6.text: 「健康が一番大事だからね。{name}は先生がちゃんと管理してあげるから。」

day1_lunch_riin_7.name: 私
day1_lunch_riin_7.text: *なんだか安心する。学校にこんな保健の先生がいると心強い。*

day1_lunch_riin_8.name: カン・リイン
day1_lunch_riin_8.text: "No fever. Open your mouth? ... Okay, you look fine."

day1_lunch_riin_10.name: カン・リイン
day1_lunch_riin_10.text: "Tension headache — makes sense on your first day. Nothing too serious."

day1_lunch_riin_11.name: 私
day1_lunch_riin_11.text: *Riin-sensei takes some medicine from a drawer and smiles. A relaxed smile.*

day1_lunch_riin_14.name: カン・リイン
day1_lunch_riin_14.text: "Have you eaten? Don't take medicine on an empty stomach."

day1_lunch_riin_17.name: 私
day1_lunch_riin_17.text: *Riin-sensei pulls an energy bar from her drawer and hands it to me.*

day1_lunch_riin_18.name: カン・リイン
day1_lunch_riin_18.text: "Eat this first. Medicine on an empty stomach is hard on you."

day1_lunch_riin_20.name: カン・リイン
day1_lunch_riin_20.text: "Looking after students is part of the job."

day1_lunch_riin_21.name: 私
day1_lunch_riin_21.text: *Riin-sensei pours me water too. She's a comfortable person. Feels like an older sister.*

day1_lunch_riin_22.name: カン・リイン
day1_lunch_riin_22.text: "If you're feeling drowsy, you can rest in the bed. It's right over there."

day1_lunch_riin_23.name: 私
day1_lunch_riin_23.text: "It's okay. I think I'll be fine once I take the medicine."

day1_lunch_riin_24.name: カン・リイン
day1_lunch_riin_24.text: "Sure. But have you had headaches like this before?"

day1_lunch_riin_26.name: カン・リイン
day1_lunch_riin_26.text: "Got it. Come whenever you're not feeling well. The nurse's office is always open."

day1_lunch_riin_27.name: 私
day1_lunch_riin_27.text: *She's warm. The nurse's office feels so cozy I could see myself coming here often.*

day1_lunch_alone_1.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_1.text: *I climb the stairs and push open the rooftop door. A gust of wind hits me.*

day1_lunch_alone_2.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_2.text: *弁当食べながらグラウンドを見下ろす。平和だ。*

day1_lunch_alone_4.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_4.text: *I eat a rice triangle I bought from the school store and look down at the schoolyard.*

day1_lunch_alone_5.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_5.text: *Students are scattered in small groups. Some playing soccer, some chatting on benches. A peaceful lunch scene.*

day1_lunch_alone_6.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_6.text: *The wind is nice. My head feels clearer.*

day1_lunch_alone_7.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_7.text: *I lean against the railing and look up at the sky. Clouds drift slowly.*

day1_lunch_alone_8.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_8.text: *...Wait. Is someone in the corner of the schoolyard pointing a camera up at me?*

day1_lunch_alone_9.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_9.text: *No, the distance is too far — probably my imagination. Photography club maybe.*

day1_lunch_alone_10.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_10.text: *...There's some kind of scratch on the railing below. Carved letters? ...Actually no, it doesn't look like letters. Just an old scuff mark.*

day1_lunch_alone_11.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_11.text: *A gust of wind. Beyond the rooftop door... something white flickered past.*

day1_lunch_alone_12.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_12.text: *When I turned, no one was there. ...Maybe something blew in with the wind.*

day1_lunch_alone_13.name: 私
day1_lunch_alone_13.text: *I finish the rice triangle and stretch. Let's do our best this afternoon.*

day1_lunch_end.name: 私
day1_lunch_end.text: *昼休みが終わった。午後の授業行こう。*
